title: 全ての道は笹針に通じる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pass by a takoyaki stand while I'm out shopping,
when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Craving a quick snack?! You look like you're
hankering for something good!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've got just the thing for you—takoyaki!
Don't you worry, they're masterfully made with
my acupuncturing skills! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With practiced hands, she quickly whips up some
takoyaki, filling the air with a mouthwatering
scent.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait for just the right moment annnd... poke! ☆
Heavens, just look at that color, that luster!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
See, they're absolutely irresistible! ☆
Acupuncture truly is applicable to anything and
everything!
choice_data_list:
What does takoyaki have to do with
acupuncture?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Both cooking and medical treatment require a
similar level of care! (I think.) How wonderful that
I can hone my art while earning an extra buck on
the side!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The days I spent flipping takoyaki while
frantically dodging hot oil...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And that one time I got yelled at for burning a
whole batch... Why, those days are well behind
me!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Come now—have a taste of the fruit of my
labors! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accept the piping hot takoyaki, pop one in my
mouth... and the harmonious combination of
chewy dough and octopus fills my senses!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, looks like it was to your liking. It was worth using my needles, then. No worries, I used the ones I keep exclusively for making takoyaki!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna churn out more while I'm still in the
groove! Woohoo, mass production! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her needle technique is exquisite... Maybe she can be trusted after all... Maybe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accept the piping hot takoyaki, pop one in my
mouth... and am immediately disappointed. There
doesn't seem to be any octopus inside.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no way... Don't tell me I forgot to put
octopus in this whole batch?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sasami Anshinzawa gets an earful from the stall
owner afterwards.
